name: Asparagus Soup (Zuppa Di Asparagi)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Freshly grated Parmesan or Pecorino cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a soup pot over medium heat until shimmering.
2. Add the minced garlic and cook for about 1 minute, stirring constantly, until golden.
3. Add the asparagus pieces to the pot and stir occasionally until they begin to turn light green and tender, about 5 minutes.
4. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Stir in the chicken broth and bring to a boil over high heat.
6. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 15 minutes or until the asparagus is very tender.
7. In a bowl, beat together the eggs and cheese.
8. When the asparagus is done, remove the pot from the heat.
9. Slowly ladle about 2 cups of hot soup into the beaten egg mixture, whisking constantly to temper the eggs.
10. Return the tempered egg mixture to the pot and stir gently until thickened.
11. Divide the soup among serving dishes.
12. Top each dish with a slice of toasted bread and sprinkle with additional grated cheese.
Serves 6.
